pi_items.source: Manual translation of 'SUGAR LABS' to standard International Morse Code.
Manual translation of '... --- ...' from standard International Morse Code.
Roundtrip of the string 'HELLO WORLD' is exactly 'HELLO WORLD'.
Extracted from export_result.sh where it executes encode.sh TEST.
Manual translation of 'TEST' to standard International Morse Code.
Extracted from export_result.sh where it executes decode.sh -.-. --- -.. .
Manual translation of '-.-. --- -.. .' from standard International Morse Code.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Morse code translation system from scratch. The expected encoding for 'SUGAR LABS' ('... ..- --. .- .-. / .-.. .- -... ...'), decoding for '... --- ...' ('SOS'), and roundtrip for 'HELLO WORLD' explicitly match standard International Morse Code mappings. The novel test cases ('TEST' -> '- . ... -' and '-.-. --- -.. .' -> 'CODE') executed dynamically by export_result.sh are also correctly translated according to standard mappings.
